profile: Junior Web Developer with a strong foundation in HTML, CSS, and JavaScript and a background in UI/UX. Comfortable implementing small features, fixing layout and styling issues, integrating content, and supporting existing codebases. Experienced working with Git, following project guidelines, and communicating clearly in remote teams. Reliable, detail-oriented, and motivated to learn quickly while contributing to real client projects.

skills.summary: Relevant skills for web feature work:
items: CSS adjustments, responsive layouts, UI fixes
Basic backend understanding (Python, APIs, request/response flow)
Debugging browser issues and fixing frontend bugs

projects.name: eCommerce website
projects.tagline: Frontend web app with forms, UI components, and product pages

bullets.text: Implemented frontend features including forms, product views, and user interactions.
Adjusted styling and layout (CSS) to improve usability and responsiveness.
Fixed UI bugs and ensured consistent behavior across components.

projects.name: Multiplayer web application
projects.tagline: Team project with real-time features and UI interaction

bullets.text: Developed and refined frontend components and integrated live data into the UI.
Worked on incremental improvements, bug fixes, and feature adjustments in a team environment.
Collaborated using Git with regular code reviews and structured task management.

experience.title: UI/UX + digital product roles (Russia)
bullets: Worked on web and email layouts, content updates, and visual adjustments.
Collaborated with teams and stakeholders, ensuring clear communication and timely delivery.
